nasb.text: But to sit on My right or on My left, this is not Mine to give; but it is for those for whom it has been prepared.”

esv.text: but to sit at my right hand or at my left is not mine to grant, but it is for those for whom it has been prepared.”

cnv.text: 只是坐在我的左右，不是我可以賜的，而是　神預備賜給誰，就賜給誰。”

ccb.text: 不过谁坐在我的左右不是我来定，而是为谁预备的，就让谁坐。”

csbs.text: 但是坐在我的右边或左边，不是我所赐的，而是已经预备给谁，就赐给谁。”
